title: WoWSP
tagline: World of WarShip Panel — replay review & in-game overlay

replay.title: Replay Review
replay.desc: Open any .wowsreplay and watch the full match on a holographic 3D map — no game launch required.

viewer.title: 3D Ship Viewer
viewer.desc: Browse every ship in the game as a low-poly holographic model. Rotate, zoom, inspect armor layouts.

overlay.title: In-Game Overlay
overlay.desc: A transparent overlay shows live team rosters while you play, visible only when you hold Tab.

stats.title: Stats & Insights
stats.desc: Deep-dive into your battle history with per-ship stats, ranked seasons, and performance trends.
